source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 'LP' AS SourceSystem,*,GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS FROM 

(
--***** DIM_BRANCH  *******

SELECT  -- NOT NULL CHECK
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS ReportDate,
'DIM_BRANCH' AS TableName,
'NOT NULL-CHECK' AS Identifier,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='FHI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS FHI_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='RTW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS RTW_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='SWR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS SWR_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='MAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MAC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='MXH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MXH_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='PBC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS PBC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='CTA' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS CTA_UNICount
FROM EDW.DIM_BRANCH WHERE UNI_Market IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL 

SELECT 
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS ReportDate,
'DIM_BRANCH' AS TableName,  -- NULL CHECK
'NULL-CHECK' AS Identifier,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='FHI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS FHI_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='RTW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS RTW_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='SWR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS SWR_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='MAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MAC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='MXH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MXH_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='PBC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS PBC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='CTA' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS CTA_UNICount

COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='CTA' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS CTA_UNICount
FROM EDW.DIM_PRODUCT_GROUP WHERE UNI_ProductGroup IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT 
'LP' AS SourceSystem,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS ReportDate,
'DIM_JOB_STATUS' AS TableName,
'BTD' AS Identifier,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='FHI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS FHI_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='RTW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS RTW_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='SWR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS SWR_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='MAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MAC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='MXH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MXH_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='PBC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS PBC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='CTA' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS CTA_UNICount,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS

FROM EDW.FACT_JOB A
JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS
ON A.JobStatusID = JS.JobStatusID
WHERE ContractDate > DATEADD(MONTH,-7,EOMONTH(GETDATE()))  -- Last 6 Months
AND ContractDate <= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,EOMONTH(GETDATE()))
AND JS.Uni_JobStatusCategory='Bank Turn Down'


UNION ALL 


SELECT 
'LP' AS SourceSystem,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS ReportDate,
'DIM_JOB_STATUS' AS TableName,
'CANCELLED' AS Identifier,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='FHI' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS FHI_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='RTW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS RTW_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='SWR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS SWR_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='MAC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MAC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='MXH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MXH_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='PBC' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS PBC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN A.Division='CTA' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ),0) AS CTA_UNICount,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS

FROM EDW.FACT_JOB A
JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS
ON A.JobStatusID = JS.JobStatusID
WHERE ContractDate > DATEADD(MONTH,-7,EOMONTH(GETDATE()))  -- Last 6 Months
AND ContractDate <= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,EOMONTH(GETDATE()))
AND JS.Uni_JobStatusCategory='Cancelled'


UNION ALL 



SELECT 
'LP' AS SourceSystem,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS ReportDate,
'DIM_JOB_STATUS' AS TableName,
'NETSALES' AS Identifier,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='FHI' THEN NetSales ELSE 0 END ),0) AS FHI_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='RTW' THEN NetSales ELSE 0 END ),0) AS RTW_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='SWR' THEN NetSales ELSE 0 END ),0) AS SWR_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='MAC' THEN NetSales ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MAC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='MXH' THEN NetSales ELSE 0 END ),0) AS MXH_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='PBC' THEN NetSales ELSE 0 END ),0) AS PBC_UNICount,
COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN Division='CTA' THEN NetSales ELSE 0 END ),0) AS CTA_UNICount,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		Division,
		(GrossSales - BTD_CANCEL) AS NetSales
		FROM
		(
			SELECT 
			A.Division,
			SUM ( COALESCE( (CASE WHEN JObNetAmt > 0 AND A.Division!='MXH' THEN JObNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) , 0) ) AS GrossSales,
			SUM	(
				CASE 
				WHEN JS.Uni_JobStatusCategory IN ('Bank Turn Down','Cancelled')
					THEN COALESCE( (CASE WHEN JObNetAmt > 0 AND A.Division!='MXH' THEN JObNetAmt ELSE GrossAmount END) , 0)
					ELSE 0 END
					)		
						AS BTD_CANCEL
			FROM EDW.FACT_JOB A
			JOIN EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS JS
			ON A.JobStatusID = JS.JobStatusID
			WHERE ContractDate > DATEADD(MONTH,-7,EOMONTH(GETDATE()))  -- Last 6 Months
			AND ContractDate <= DATEADD(MONTH,-1,EOMONTH(GETDATE()))
			
			GROUP BY A.Division
			
			) M1
			
	) M_F
